programme.desc:
With 1.5m and onshore breeze, it'll be a bumpy ride, hopefully not a complete closeout show.
🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h SSW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s ONSHORE

With 1.5m and onshore breeze, it'll be a bumpy ride, hopefully not a complete closeout show.

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
With that crosswind and only 1.5m swell, today's Molhe Leste will offer some bumpy rides, if you're easily amused.
🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h SSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
1. 5m, twelve seconds, cross-shore... might be worth a paddle, might be a closeout rodeo.
🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h SSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 1.5m @ 12s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
With 1.5m of swell and offshore winds, Cantinho might just offer a rideable wave or two today.
🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h SSW (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.4m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
With 2.4m of swell and that wind, today's Ribeira session will either be memorable for survival or entirely forgettable.
🌊 Swell: 2.4m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 31.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 19.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 32.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
With that crosswind on a 2.3m swell, you'll mostly be eating sand today.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 19.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 32.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 2.3m and onshore wind, today's Cantinho session promises a vigorous workout more than wave riding.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 19.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 32.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 2.3m of onshore chop, today's Baleal Norte session promises more exercise than thrills.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 19.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 32.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
Those 2.3 meters are going to be chewed up by the wind; might be a good day to watch the seagulls.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 19.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 32.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
